user.title: Nest Recorder
user.description: Enter AWS credentials for the bucket to mirror recordings to, and the local path where files are written.

error.auth: Could not reach bucket with those credentials (head_bucket failed).
error.storage_path: Local storage path is not writable.

abort.already_configured: A Nest Recorder entry for that bucket/region already exists.

record_clip.name: Record clip
record_clip.description: Tag the currently-rolling segment as a manual event.

restore_from_glacier.name: Restore from Glacier
restore_from_glacier.description: Initiate a Glacier restore for one or more segments.

rebuild_index.name: Rebuild index
rebuild_index.description: Reconcile the SQLite index with files on disk.

purge_local.name: Purge local
purge_local.description: Delete local MP4 files older than N days.

extend_retention.name: Extend retention
extend_retention.description: Pin a segment from garbage collection.
